name: spark-mail
title: Spark Mail
description: Search, browse, read, and compose Spark email from Raycast via the Spark CLI.
author: wiro

preferences.name: sparkPath
preferences.title: Spark CLI Path
preferences.description: Absolute path to the spark binary. Find it with `which spark`.

commands.name: search
commands.title: Search Mail
commands.description: Hybrid keyword + semantic search across your Spark mailbox.

commands.name: inbox
commands.title: Inbox
commands.description: Browse your unified inbox with smart views and load-more.

commands.name: calendar
commands.title: Calendar
commands.description: View your Spark calendar agenda for today, tomorrow, or this week.

commands.name: contacts
commands.title: Search Contacts
commands.description: Look up contacts by name or email and find their messages.

commands.name: folders
commands.title: Browse Folders
commands.description: Browse folders and labels, then drill into their emails.

commands.name: compose
commands.title: Compose Email
commands.description: Draft a new email in Spark (requires Triage access).
